reasoning: Question asks if there will be more than 10 times the 360-day average plus 1 of 'Explosions/Remote violence' in Brunei. Brunei is an extremely peaceful country with virtually no incidents of political violence, let alone explosions or remote violence. Searches for 'Brunei' along with 'explosion', 'attack', or 'violence' in 2026 yield absolutely nothing. Given the base rate and the threshold (expected to be around 11 events), it is virtually impossible to hit this in a 30-day period without a major war breaking out, which there is zero evidence for. Submitting 0.02 (the lowest possible probability in the allowed range of 0.02-0.98).
